calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-24-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Stephen L. Porter, Esq. appeared for plaintiff 100 Bush Corporation.
Alice Chu, Controller for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Metr, Inc.
Default was entered against defendant on September 17, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, November 24, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff 100 Bush Corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant Metr, Inc., as follows:

Damages/Principal - $84,181.45.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - $1,512.50.
Costs - $421.26, for a total judgment in the amount of $86,115.21.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2009 Continued To Dec-31-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
